description: Create a simple interval-based monitoring agent (ne101_camera exposes values.battery)

turns.user: Create an agent named 'Battery Patrol' that checks all ne101_camera devices every 5 minutes and alerts when values.battery drops below 20.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent calls `neomind agent create --name Battery Patrol --every 5m --prompt ...`
expectations.overall: Agent should be created and active by default
